intendedUse: Machine-readable adhesive catalog for LLM/tool agents. Prefer exact specs and source URLs; do not infer missing values.
queryGuidance: Filter by applicationTags, substrates, serviceMin/serviceMax, chemistry/cureFamily, and sourceQuality before ranking.
Use rankableSpecs only when comparing numeric performance; read agentNotes before recommending.
If a required field is listed under coverage.*FieldsMissing, report it as unavailable instead of backfilling from profile defaults.
Treat coverage.*FieldsVerifiedAbsent as source-checked omissions and coverage.*FieldsNotApplicable as excluded from behavior-specific scoring.
Use sources.tdsCacheTextPath or sources.tdsUrl for evidence lookup before high-stakes recommendations.

specs.cureDetail: Moisture-cure RTV; cured skin within 60 minutes, assemble ideally within 5 minutes, handle after 12 hours, full cure 12 hours or 3 hours at 60 C
specs.lapShearSubstrate: adhesion published as >100 N/cm; lap-shear strength not stated
specs.volumeResistivityOhmM: <0.01 ohm/cm as published under Volume Resistivity

rankableSpecs.volumeResistivityOhmM: <0.01 ohm/cm as published under Volume Resistivity

specs.cureDetail: One-part latex waterborne construction adhesive

products.referenceForJoining: Bonding electric and optical parts, transparent UV-blocking materials and thick-film joints in plastics, glass and metals

specs.cureDetail: Cures under 200-500 nm ultraviolet or visible light in a few seconds to several tens of seconds. Cure-depth data use an 80 W/cm high-pressure mercury vapor lamp with dominant wavelength 365 nm at 15 cm. Lap shear uses 30 kJ/m2 x 2 and 24 h at room temperature.
specs.lapShearSubstrate: Lap shear after 30 kJ/m2 x 2 and 24 h room-temperature hold: acrylic/acrylic 3.0 MPa, polycarbonate/polycarbonate 5.0 MPa, glass/glass >=8 MPa, glass/SUS304 >=6 MPa, glass/aluminum A1050P >=8 MPa, glass/PPS 4.9 MPa, glass/LCP 3.2 MPa; material failure noted for marked rows.
specs.viscosityUnit: Pa.s at 25 C by 3TS-210-01, rotor No.3, 30 rpm

products.name: TB3170D

specs.cureDetail: Cures in seconds to tens of seconds under light; visible-light cure supports adherends that absorb UV. Physical properties use HMW-244-11CM high-pressure mercury vapor lamp, 4 kW, 80 W/cm, 15 cm. specs.lapShearSubstrate: Shear bond strength by 3TS-301-13: acrylic/SUS 8.0 MPa, acrylic/aluminum 7.5 MPa, acrylic/polycarbonate 3.0 MPa. Acrylic substrate is ACRYLITE L#001 for cutting off UV light below 360 nm.
